text: AWS Control Tower - Guard Rails @ stiencnita. © st e Guardrails are rules - multi-account governance * Mandatory, Strongly Recommended or Elective e Preventive - Stop you doing things (AWS ORG SCP) » ... enforced or not enabled ¢ ... i.e allow or deny regions or disallow bucket policy changes e Detective - compliance checks (AWS CONFIG Rules) e .. clear, in violation or not enabled e .. detect CloudTrail enabled or EC2 Public IPv4
